name: IdsEdwProvMcareDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_base AS (SELECT PROV_MCARE_SK,COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD,PROV_ID,MCARE_SEQ_NO,PROV_SK,MCARE_BILL_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_MCARE PROV_MCARE LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON PROV_MCARE.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK),cte_final AS (SELECT PROV_MCARE_SK,SRC_SYS_CD,PROV_ID,MCARE_SEQ_NO AS PROV_MCARE_SEQ_NO,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,PROV_SK,MCARE_BILL_NO AS PROV_MCARE_BILL_NO,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_base) SELECT * FROM cte_final
